mandates.mandate: Hooks are non-blocking. A failing hook NEVER halts a workflow.
Hooks run after persist. They modify on-disk artifacts, not engine state.
Hooks run in declared order. Later hooks see earlier hooks' changes.
If no hooks registered in global.yaml, this protocol is a no-op.

step.title: Check for registered hooks
step.action: Read hooks array from global.yaml. If absent, empty, or all disabled: return (no-op).

step.title: Match artifact against hook targets
step.action: For each hook: check if persisted artifact path matches hook's target_patterns (glob).

step.title: Invoke matching hooks
step.action: Provide: artifact_path, artifact_content, step_metadata (workflow_id, step_index, agent_id).
Hook may modify artifact in place.
On success: log and continue. On failure: log warning, do NOT halt, continue.

step.title: Return
step.action: All hooks processed. Return. Workflow continues regardless.
